name: Spa-Camole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place parsley and cilantro in a food processor work bowl.
2. Process until the herbs are finely chopped.
3. Add cottage cheese to the processed herbs, then process until smooth.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (chopped green chilies, tomato, green pepper, garlic, cumin), stirring after each addition.
5. Serve with pita or flour tortilla wedges.
